title: Enter access credential
heading: Enter the management workbench
description: Enter the access credential for the current SeaLantern instance to continue.
token_help: This credential is only used for the current management entry.
remember_help: Only use this on fixed admin devices.
message_token_invalid: Credential is invalid. Enter it again.
message_saved_credential_invalid: The saved credential is no longer valid. Enter it again.
message_preset_credential_invalid: The preset credential is unavailable. Enter one again.
message_unreachable: Unable to reach the current instance.
message_session_expired: The current session expired. Verify again.
